Google and Amazon's co-investment signals a platform competition for who supplies the AI 'brain' to hardware makers.

title: Sunday Robotics — Series B $200M
excerpt: Sunday achieves unicorn status with its Series B, reaching a $1.15B valuation on the strength of its household humanoid assistant product. The company has pivoted from pure-industrial to consumer-plus-commercial, targeting the home care and elderly assistance markets in Japan, South Korea, and China. Hillhouse's lead reflects conviction that the consumer humanoid market will outpace industrial deployment by 2028.
